# ViolinPlot

Data-driven SVG violin plot for @rokkit/chart. Shows distribution shape via quartile-based density estimation.

## Import

```svelte
import { ViolinPlot } from '@rokkit/chart'
```

## Usage

```svelte
<!-- Basic violin plot -->
<ViolinPlot data={data} x="class" y="hwy" />

<!-- With color coding -->
<ViolinPlot data={data} x="class" y="hwy" fill="drv" legend />

<!-- Without grid -->
<ViolinPlot data={data} x="class" y="hwy" grid={false} />
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| data | Object[] | [] | Raw observations array |
| x | string | — | Categorical grouping field |
| y | string | — | Numeric value field (raw observations) |
| fill | string | — | Color channel field |
| width | number | 600 | SVG width |
| height | number | 400 | SVG height |
| mode | 'light' \| 'dark' | 'light' | Color palette mode |
| grid | boolean | true | Show gridlines |
| legend | boolean | false | Show legend |

## Notes

- Uses ViolinBrewer internally (extends QuartileBrewer, the shared base with BoxBrewer)
- Wider sections of the violin indicate higher data density at that value
- x must be categorical; y must be numeric raw observations
